summary: Verified route overlay signs z-ordering and app reliability features. Custom Leaflet panes (routePane z-420, signPane z-630) ensure signs render above route polyline. All 6 sign placement functions use pane:'signPane'. Route fetch has retry logic with exponential backoff. Network offline banner and GPS weak signal indicators implemented. Settings truck profile edit modal works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Custom panes created at map init - routePane (z-index 420) at line 687-689, signPane (z-index 630) at line 692-694
VERIFIED: Route polylines use pane:'routePane' at lines 916 and 926
VERIFIED: placeHighwayShields uses pane:'signPane' at line 999
VERIFIED: placeExitSigns uses pane:'signPane' at line 1024
VERIFIED: placeCurveSigns uses pane:'signPane' at line 1050
VERIFIED: placeSpeedLimitSigns uses pane:'signPane' at line 1072
VERIFIED: placeTrafficSlowdowns uses pane:'signPane' at line 1100
VERIFIED: placeCmvWarnings uses pane:'signPane' at line 1171
VERIFIED: Route fetch retry logic in /app/src/services/hereService.ts with maxRetries=2 and exponential backoff (1s, 2s)
VERIFIED: Network offline banner at lines 5045-5053 with data-testid='network-offline-banner'
VERIFIED: GPS weak signal indicator at lines 5055-5065 with data-testid='gps-weak-signal'
VERIFIED: isOnline state in App.tsx at line 288 with online/offline event listeners
VERIFIED: gpsAccuracyRef in TelemetryContext at line 57 in App.tsx
VERIFIED: AppContextType includes gpsAccuracy and isOnline in types.ts lines 154-155
VERIFIED: .vehicle-pointer CSS has transition:none in index.css line 41

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Route overlay signs z-ordering verified: routePane (z-420) for polylines, signPane (z-630) for all sign markers. Console logs confirm '[Shields] Placed 25 highway shield markers on route', '[Signs] Placed 4 exit signs on route', '[Signs] Placed 4 speed limit signs on route'. Network monitoring and GPS quality tracking implemented in AppContext. Route fetch has retry logic with exponential backoff.

navigation_view_loads.details: Navigation view loads with satellite map, weather widget, search bar, and map controls

custom_leaflet_panes.details: routePane (z-420) and signPane (z-630) created at map initialization (lines 687-694)

sign_markers_pane.details: All 6 sign placement functions use pane:'signPane' - highway shields (999), exit signs (1024), curve signs (1050), speed limit signs (1072), traffic slowdowns (1100), CMV warnings (1171)

route_calculation.details: Route from Council Bluffs to Denver calculated successfully - 545.9 mi, 7h 40m. Console shows 25 highway shields, 4 exit signs, 4 speed limit signs placed

highway_shields_visible.details: I-80, I-29, US-35, US-192 shields visible on route in screenshots

exit_signs_visible.details: EXIT 51 sign visible on route in screenshots

speed_limit_signs_visible.details: Speed limit 35 sign visible on route in screenshots

network_offline_banner.details: data-testid='network-offline-banner' implemented at lines 5045-5053, not visible when online (correct behavior)

gps_weak_signal_indicator.details: data-testid='gps-weak-signal' implemented at lines 5055-5065, not visible when GPS is strong (correct behavior)

route_fetch_retry_logic.details: hereService.ts has maxRetries=2 with exponential backoff (1s, 2s delay)

settings_truck_profile_edit.details: Edit modal opens with input field, Cancel and Save buttons work correctly

app_navigation.details: App navigates between Dashboard, Navigation, and Settings views without crashing

code_verification.retry_logic: hereService.ts lines 13-48: maxRetries=2, exponential backoff with attempt*1000ms delay
code_verification.isOnline_state: App.tsx line 288: useState with navigator.onLine, event listeners for online/offline
code_verification.gpsAccuracyRef: App.tsx line 57: useRef<number | null>(null), updated in geolocation callback
